name: Mant

attacks.name: hammer blow
attacks.tell: The Mant raises one of its enormous arms and brings it down in a crushing blow.
attacks.howToAvoid: Roll to the side when you see his arm rise
attacks.notes: The impact causes a tremor that can stagger the player if they are too close.

attacks.name: sonic clap
attacks.tell: Strike both palms creating a visible shock wave
attacks.howToAvoid: Jump just before the wave hits you to reduce the impact, or block but still take some damage
attacks.notes: The wave travels in a straight line. Deals moderate damage and can stun in a wide frontal cone

attacks.name: Jump Lunge
attacks.tell: He bends his knees and lunges towards you with a big jump.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge laterally at the last moment, as it can slightly correct the trajectory in the air
attacks.notes: Covers great distance. If it hits, in addition to the damage it knocks you to the ground

attacks.name: Ant Summon O.R.C.
attacks.tell: Emits a mechanical hum from its chest
attacks.notes: Summons O.R.C. ants. (robotic ants) to assist you in combat when your health drops below 50%. These ants explode when they die

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: The Mant opens like a lab brute: heavy punches, sonic claps, and short leaps that stop you from settling in front of him.
bossPhases.trigger: It begins once the Mant fully drops onto the Undershed Lab platform.

attacks.name: hammer blow
attacks.tell: The Mant raises one of its enormous arms and brings it down in a crushing blow.
attacks.howToAvoid: Roll to the side when you see his arm rise
attacks.notes: The impact causes a tremor that can stagger the player if they are too close.

attacks.name: sonic clap
attacks.tell: Strike both palms creating a visible shock wave
attacks.howToAvoid: Jump just before the wave hits you to reduce the impact, or block but still take some damage
attacks.notes: The wave travels in a straight line. Deals moderate damage and can stun in a wide frontal cone

attacks.name: Jump Lunge
attacks.tell: He bends his knees and lunges towards you with a big jump.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge laterally at the last moment, as it can slightly correct the trajectory in the air
attacks.notes: Covers great distance. If it hits, in addition to the damage it knocks you to the ground

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.summary: With the first roar the fight turns into attrition: he calls in an O.R.C. fire worker ant and broadens the kit with ranged control.
bossPhases.trigger: He enters at 75% health after pounding his chest and calling his first reinforcement.
newPatterns: The add will not win the fight alone, but it will punish any heal or punish that lasts too long.

attacks.name: hammer blow
attacks.tell: The Mant raises one of its enormous arms and brings it down in a crushing blow.
attacks.howToAvoid: Roll to the side when you see his arm rise
attacks.notes: The impact causes a tremor that can stagger the player if they are too close.

attacks.name: sonic clap
attacks.tell: Strike both palms creating a visible shock wave
attacks.howToAvoid: Jump just before the wave hits you to reduce the impact, or block but still take some damage
attacks.notes: The wave travels in a straight line. Deals moderate damage and can stun in a wide frontal cone

attacks.name: Ant Summon O.R.C.
attacks.tell: Emits a mechanical hum from its chest
attacks.notes: Summons O.R.C. ants. (robotic ants) to assist you in combat when your health drops below 50%. These ants explode when they die

attacks.name: Web Shot
attacks.tell: It lifts its torso and spits a direct web projectile at your position.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move diagonally and do not take it standing still; the web exists to feed him another sequence.
attacks.notes: The partial snare matters more than the raw damage if an add is still alive.

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.summary: The last phase adds explosive pressure. The Mant calls in an O.R.C. fire soldier ant and starts punishing the ground behind you as well.
bossPhases.trigger: He enters at 50% health with another roar and a clearly more dangerous reinforcement.
newPatterns: Reading the boss’s front is no longer enough: you must also respect the explosions and the heavier add.

attacks.name: hammer blow
attacks.tell: The Mant raises one of its enormous arms and brings it down in a crushing blow.
attacks.howToAvoid: Roll to the side when you see his arm rise
attacks.notes: The impact causes a tremor that can stagger the player if they are too close.

attacks.name: Jump Lunge
attacks.tell: He bends his knees and lunges towards you with a big jump.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge laterally at the last moment, as it can slightly correct the trajectory in the air
attacks.notes: Covers great distance. If it hits, in addition to the damage it knocks you to the ground

attacks.name: Explosive Spore Toss
attacks.tell: It cocks its arm back and throws a fungal mass that explodes on impact.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not back straight up; make an angle so the blast does not pin you against the add.
attacks.notes: This is why the last phase punishes greedy positioning so hard.

attacks.name: Ant Summon O.R.C.
attacks.tell: Emits a mechanical hum from its chest
attacks.notes: Summons O.R.C. ants. (robotic ants) to assist you in combat when your health drops below 50%. These ants explode when they die

description: An abomination created by Wendell Tully as the final vessel to escape his fate. It blocks the path to the last stretch of the Undershed Lab.
behavior: It starts as a brute built around fists and swipes, but as it loses health it adds fire ant summons, spore bombs, back explosions, and finally web shots that reel the player in.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile from the start and can only be defeated once. Its real punishment is not just damage, but how it mixes space control with summoned adds.
interactionWithCreatures: It first summons a fire worker ant and later a fire soldier ant. Its own fungal attacks can damage or even kill those summons if they are positioned poorly.
strategy: Fresh is the main answer. If you do not control the summoned ants, the fight gets messy fast, but you can also exploit the Mant's own fungal attacks hitting them by mistake.
respawnInfo: Does not respawn. It can only be defeated once per save.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Punch: 120
Combo punch: 100
Overhead smash: 80
Spore toss: 150
Back explosions: 300
Web shot: 15
